title: Backend Developer Vacancy at SigTuple South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at SigTuple South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
SigTuple South Asia Partners invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Gwalior location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SigTuple South Asia Partners:
SigTuple South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SigTuple South Asia Partners!
